title: Grok16 5.0 — 2D field platform (auto-field, no field files)
motto: One flat plane. Everything on the plane is already field. Never write field files — they heat neighboring fields.

warning.headline: DO NOT CREATE FIELD FILES
warning.body: Standalone .field, depth-field, subfield, or nested field JSON/Launch files are forbidden. They stack amplitude on amplitude, export thermal debt to every field on the SG fabric, and violate max_field_depth: 0. Use the 2D platform — placement implies field; truth stays one amplitude.
warning.heat_mechanism: A field file is a second amplitude source. Ironclad gates flatten it, but the flatten pass costs thermo_proxy on adjacent dies — heat on other fields before singularizer catches up.

platform_2d.rule: Flat (x, y) operator plane — every widget, tab, compile chamber, and wire endpoint placed on the plane is auto-field at depth 0
